title: School Pickup
scene: 你去学校接孩子，和老师简短交流。

turns.cn: 您好，今天小明表现很好。
turns.en: Hi. Tommy had a great day today.

turns.cn: 谢谢老师！作业多吗？
turns.en: Thank you! Is there much homework?

turns.cn: 一页数学题，周五有拼写测验。
turns.en: One page of math. There's a spelling test on Friday.

turns.cn: 好的，我们会复习。明天带体育服吗？
turns.en: Okay, we'll review. Does he need gym clothes tomorrow?

turns.cn: 周三才是体育课。
turns.en: Gym is on Wednesday.

turns.cn: 明白了，小明，跟老师说再见。
turns.en: Got it. Tommy, say goodbye to your teacher.

turns.cn: 再见，明天见！
turns.en: Bye! See you tomorrow!

turns.cn: 孩子怎么了？
turns.en: What's going on with your child?

turns.cn: 发烧两天了，三十八点三度。
turns.en: Fever for two days, about a hundred point nine.

turns.cn: 咳嗽吗？食欲怎么样？
turns.en: Any cough? How's her appetite?

turns.cn: 有点咳，不太想吃饭。
turns.en: A little cough. She doesn't want to eat much.

turns.cn: 耳朵有点红，可能是耳部感染。
turns.en: Her ears are a bit red. Could be an ear infection.

turns.cn: 需要抗生素吗？
turns.en: Will she need antibiotics?

turns.cn: 开一种儿童口服液，一天两次。
turns.en: I'll prescribe a liquid. Twice a day.

turns.cn: 早上好！昨晚睡得好吗？
turns.en: Good morning! Did she sleep well last night?

turns.cn: 还不错，中午可能需要午睡。
turns.en: Pretty well. She might need a nap around noon.

turns.cn: 午餐吃过了吗？
turns.en: Has she had breakfast?

turns.cn: 吃过了，奶瓶在包里，三点左右喝。
turns.en: Yes. The bottle is in the bag, around three o'clock.

turns.cn: 对花生过敏对吧？我们会注意。
turns.en: Allergic to peanuts, right? We'll watch for that.

turns.cn: 对，EpiPen在侧袋。五点来接。
turns.en: Yes. EpiPen is in the side pocket. I'll pick her up at five.

turns.cn: 好的，再见！
turns.en: Okay. Bye!

turns.cn: 感谢您来，孩子数学进步很大。
turns.en: Thanks for coming. He's improved a lot in math.

turns.cn: 在家我们也多练，有什么建议吗？
turns.en: We practice at home too. Any suggestions?

turns.cn: 阅读可以再加强，每天二十分钟。
turns.en: Reading could use a boost. Twenty minutes a day.

turns.cn: 他在班上和同学相处怎么样？
turns.en: How does he get along with classmates?

turns.cn: 很友善，有时上课有点分心。
turns.en: Very friendly. Sometimes a bit distracted in class.

turns.cn: 我们会和他谈谈，谢谢老师。
turns.en: We'll talk to him about it. Thank you.

turns.cn: 有问题随时邮件我。
turns.en: Email me anytime if you have questions.

title: Playground
scene: 你在游乐场看着孩子玩，和其他家长聊天。

turns.cn: 你家孩子几岁？跑得真快！
turns.en: How old is yours? He runs fast!

turns.cn: 五岁，精力旺盛，每天要来放风。
turns.en: Five. Full of energy. We come here every day.

turns.cn: 滑梯那边要排队，小心推搡。
turns.en: The slide gets crowded. Watch for pushing.

turns.cn: 谢谢提醒。你们住附近吗？
turns.en: Thanks for the heads-up. Do you live nearby?

turns.cn: 三个街区，经常这个点来。
turns.en: Three blocks away. We usually come around this time.

turns.cn: 那下次可以一起玩。
turns.en: Maybe the kids can play together again.

turns.cn: 好啊，交换个电话？
turns.en: Sure. Want to swap numbers?

turns.cn: 你有照顾五岁孩子的经验吗？
turns.en: Do you have experience with five-year-olds?

turns.cn: 有，做了三年，可以提供推荐人。
turns.en: Yes, three years. I can give you references.

turns.cn: 周六晚上六点到十点，时薪多少？
turns.en: Saturday six to ten PM. What's your rate?

turns.cn: 十八一小时，两个孩子加五块。
turns.en: Eighteen an hour. Five extra for two kids.

turns.cn: 孩子九点睡觉，过敏花生。
turns.en: Bedtime is nine. He's allergic to peanuts.

turns.cn: 明白，EpiPen在厨房抽屉。
turns.en: Got it. Is the EpiPen in the kitchen drawer?

turns.cn: 对，我们的号码在冰箱上。
turns.en: Yes. Our numbers are on the fridge.

title: Child at the Dentist
scene: 你带害怕牙医的孩子去检查牙齿。

turns.cn: 你好小朋友，我们数牙齿好不好？
turns.en: Hi there. Want to count your teeth together?

turns.cn: 他有点紧张，第一次来。
turns.en: He's a little nervous. It's his first visit.

turns.cn: 没关系，先坐大大椅子，给你墨镜。
turns.en: That's okay. Sit in the big chair. Here are cool sunglasses.

turns.cn: 宝贝，医生只是看一看。
turns.en: Sweetie, the doctor is just going to look.

turns.cn: 没有蛀牙，刷得很好！贴纸选一个。
turns.en: No cavities. Great brushing! Pick a sticker.

turns.cn: 下次六个月后再来对吗？
turns.en: We come back in six months, right?

turns.cn: 对，继续每天刷两次。
turns.en: Yes. Keep brushing twice a day.

title: School Snow Day
scene: 下大雪学校停课，你安排孩子在家。

turns.cn: 学校发短信说今天停课。
turns.en: School texted. No class today.

turns.cn: 太好了！可以出去玩雪吗？
turns.en: Yes! Can we play in the snow?

turns.cn: 吃完早餐，穿暖和再去。
turns.en: After breakfast, and bundle up warm.

turns.cn: 能堆雪人吗？
turns.en: Can we build a snowman?

turns.cn: 可以，但中午前要完成作业。
turns.en: Sure, but homework before noon.

turns.cn: 好吧。
turns.en: Okay.

turns.cn: 热巧克力回来喝。
turns.en: We'll have hot chocolate when you come in.

title: Kids Birthday Party
scene: 你在室内游乐场订孩子生日派对。

turns.cn: 派对套餐多少孩子？要主题装饰吗？
turns.en: How many kids for the party package? Want themed decor?

turns.cn: 十二个孩子，公主主题，下周六下午。
turns.en: Twelve kids, princess theme, next Saturday afternoon.

turns.cn: 两小时三百五，含披萨和果汁。
turns.en: Two hours, three fifty, pizza and juice included.

turns.cn: 家长可以跟着吗？有过敏的孩子。
turns.en: Can parents stay? One child has a nut allergy.

turns.cn: 可以，蛋糕自己带，我们禁坚果。
turns.en: Yes. Bring your own cake. We're nut-free.

turns.cn: 需要交定金吗？
turns.en: Do you need a deposit?

turns.cn: 一百定金，余款当天付。
turns.en: A hundred deposit. Balance due the day of.

title: Playdate Invitation
scene: 你帮孩子在公园约同学来家里玩。

turns.cn: 周六下午 Lily 能来我们家玩吗？
turns.en: Could Lily come over Saturday afternoon to play?

turns.cn: 可以的，几点？需要带什么吗？
turns.en: Sure. What time? Should she bring anything?

turns.cn: 两点到四点，换运动鞋，我们有零食。
turns.en: Two to four. Sneakers, please. We'll have snacks.

turns.cn: 她对花生过敏，请注意。
turns.en: She's allergic to peanuts, just so you know.

turns.cn: 明白，我不会放花生制品。
turns.en: Got it. I won't have anything with peanuts.

turns.cn: 四点半我来接，谢谢邀请！
turns.en: I'll pick her up at four thirty. Thanks for inviting her!

turns.cn: 不客气，孩子们玩得开心就好。
turns.en: You're welcome. Hope they have fun!
